summary: React State Update Clarity and Potential Bug Fix

message.content: このブランチのコミットの Article 15 content は develop と差分がある?

content.text: ブランチ間の Article 15 content の差分を確認します。まず、どのファイルに Article 15 content が含まれているか探します。

input.description: ブランチ間の変更ファイル一覧を取得

content.text: privacy-policy.tsx ファイルに Article 15 が含まれていて、このブランチで変更されていることがわかりました。差分を確認します。

input.command: git diff develop..HEAD web/src/pages/privacy-policy.tsx | grep -A 20 -B 5 "Article 15\|第15条\|第 15 条"
input.description: Article 15 周辺の差分を抽出

content.content:
--- a/web/src/pages/privacy-policy.tsx
+++ b/web/src/pages/privacy-policy.tsx
@@ -135,8 +135,12 @@ const privacyPolicyContent = {
       },
       {
         title: 'Article 15 (US State Law Provisions)',
-        content: 'The Company will not discriminate against a User that chooses to exercise any rights related to a User's privacy or Personal Information. The Company will not deny goods or services, charge different prices or rates, provide a different level of service or quality of goods, or suggest that a User might receive a different price or level of quality for goods as a result of User exercising any rights herein.

Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, Oregon, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and Virginia

These additional rights and disclosures may apply to residents of Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, Oregon, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and Virginia.

Data Subject Requests

If a User is a resident of these states, these state's law may provide some or all of the following rights:

To confirm whether or not the Company is processing User's personal data;
To access User's personal data;
To correct inaccuracies in User's personal data;
To delete User's personal data;
To obtain a copy of User's personal data that User previously provided to the Company in a portable and readily usable format; or
To obtain a list of third parties to which the Company disclosed User's personal data.

To exercise any of these rights, a User must submit a request as provided for in Article 12. Please note these rights are subject to exceptions. If a User has an account with the Company, the Company may require User to use the account to submit the request. In the request, please specify which right User is seeking to exercise and the scope of the request. The Company will confirm receipt of the request within 10 days and respond to the request within 45 days. To verify User identity, the Company may require a User to confirm receipt of an email sent to an email address that matches Company records, provide the Company with details relating to User's history with the Company, or provide additional information. If the Company is unable to verify a User's identity, the Company may deny User's request.

Sales and Targeted Advertising

The Company does not disclose or otherwise sell personal data (e.g., identifiers and service and platform usage) or Personal Information to any third party for the purposes of selling such personal data or Personal Information or for providing targeted or behavioral advertising.

Profiling

The Company does not process personal data or Personal Information for purposes of profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects concerning consumers.

Designated Methods and Authorized Agents

All rights requests must be exercised through the designated methods listed above. A User may make a rights request using an authorized agent. The Company requires written and signed proof of the agent's permission to do so and the Company may verify User identity directly with the User.

Appeal

A User may have the right to appeal the Company's denial of User's request. To appeal, please contact the Company at the email address provided in Article 12 and specify what the User would like to appeal. The Company will review and respond to the appeal in accordance with applicable law. If the Company denies the appeal, the User may submit a complaint as follows:

For Colorado residents, visit https://coag.gov/file-complaint/
For Connecticut residents, visit https://www.dir.ct.gov/ag/complaint/
For Delaware residents, visit https://attorneygeneral.delaware.gov/fraud/cmu/complaint/
For Iowa residents, visit https://www.iowaattorneygeneral.gov/for-consumers/file-a-consumer-complaint
For Montana residents, visit https://dojmt.gov/office-of-consumer-protection/consumer-complaints/
For Nebraska residents, visit https://www.nebraska.gov/apps-ago-complaints/
For New Hampshire residents, visit https://www.doj.nh.gov/citizens/consumer-protection-antitrust-bureau/consumer-complaints
For Oregon residents, visit https://www.doj.state.or.us/oregon-department-of-justice/contact-us/
For Tennessee residents, visit https://www.tn.gov/attorneygeneral/working-for-tennessee/consumer/file-a-complaint
For Texas residents, visit https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/consumer-protection/file-consumer-complaint
For Utah residents, visit https://attorneygeneral.utah.gov/contact/complaint-form/
For Virginia residents, visit https://www.oag.state.va.us/consumercomplaintform

[Canada] Under PIPEDA, you may request access to and correction of your personal information. If you are not satisfied with our response, you may contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada. To exercise your rights, email info@knowhere.co.jp.

[República Dominicana] Conforme a la Ley 172‑13, usted puede ejercer los derechos de acceso, rectificación, cancelación y oposición respecto de sus datos personales. Sus datos pueden transferirse y alojarse en [United States and Japan]. Para ejercer sus derechos: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Panamá] De acuerdo con la Ley 81/2019 y su Decreto 285/2021, usted puede solicitar acceso, rectificación, cancelación u oposición de sus datos. Podemos transferir y almacenar datos en [United States and Japan]. Solicitudes: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Nicaragua] Bajo la Ley 787, usted puede ejercer derechos de acceso, rectificación, oposición y cancelación sobre sus datos personales. Los datos pueden transferirse a y almacenarse en [United States and Japan]. Contacto: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Venezuela] Respetamos los derechos de acceso, rectificación y eliminación reconocidos por la normativa aplicable. Sus datos pueden alojarse en [United States and Japan]. Para solicitudes: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[대한민국] 만 14세 미만 사용자의 개인정보 처리는 법정대리인의 동의를 전제로 합니다. 귀하는 개인정보의 열람·정정·삭제·처리정지 등을 요청할 수 있습니다. 서비스 제공을 위해 개인정보가 [United States and Japan]의 서버로 이전·보관될 수 있습니다. 문의: info@knowhere.co.jp

[台灣] 您依據《個人資料保護法》就本服務所蒐集、處理或利用之個人資料,得行使查詢、請求閱覽或製給複製本、補充或更正、請求停止蒐集/處理/利用,以及請求刪除之權利。資料可能傳輸並保存於 [United States and Japan] 之伺服器。如欲行使權利,請聯絡 info@knowhere.co.jp。'
-      }
+        content: 'The Company will not discriminate against a User that chooses to exercise any rights related to a User's privacy or Personal Information. The Company will not deny goods or services, charge different prices or rates, provide a different level of service or quality of goods, or suggest that a User might receive a different price or level of quality for goods as a result of User exercising any rights herein.

The Company does not process personal data or Personal Information for purposes of profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects concerning consumers.

All rights requests must be exercised through the designated methods listed above. A User may make a rights request using an authorized agent. The Company requires written and signed proof of the agent's permission to do so and the Company may verify User identity directly with the User.
Appeal
A User may have the right to appeal the Company's denial of User's request. To appeal, please contact the Company at the email address provided in Article 12 and specify what the User would like to appeal. The Company will review and respond to the appeal in accordance with applicable law. If the Company denies the appeal, the User may submit a complaint as follows:
For Colorado residents, visit https://coag.gov/file-complaint/
For Connecticut residents, visit https://www.dir.ct.gov/ag/complaint/
For Delaware residents, visit https://attorneygeneral.delaware.gov/fraud/cmu/complaint/
For Iowa residents, visit https://www.iowaattorneygeneral.gov/for-consumers/file-a-consumer-complaint
For Montana residents, visit https://dojmt.gov/office-of-consumer-protection/consumer-complaints/
For Nebraska residents, visit https://www.nebraska.gov/apps-ago-complaints/
For New Hampshire residents, visit https://www.doj.nh.gov/citizens/consumer-protection-antitrust-bureau/consumer-complaints
For Oregon residents, visit https://www.doj.state.or.us/oregon-department-of-justice/contact-us/
For Tennessee residents, visit https://www.tn.gov/attorneygeneral/working-for-tennessee/consumer/file-a-complaint
For Texas residents, visit https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/consumer-protection/file-consumer-complaint
For Utah residents, visit https://attorneygeneral.utah.gov/contact/complaint-form/
For Virginia residents, visit https://www.oag.state.va.us/consumercomplaintform

[República Dominicana] Conforme a la Ley 172-13, usted puede ejercer los derechos de acceso, rectificación, cancelación y oposición respecto de sus datos personales. Sus datos pueden transferirse y alojarse en [United States and Japan]. Para ejercer sus derechos: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Venezuela] Respetamos los derechos de acceso, rectificación y eliminación reconocidos por la normativa aplicable. Sus datos pueden alojarse en [United States and Japan]. Para solicitudes: info@knowhere.co.jp.

+      },
+      {
+        title: 'Regional supplements',
+        content: '[South Korea] Under the PIPA, you may request access, correction, deletion, or suspension of processing, and withdraw consent at any time. If you are under 14, parental/guardian consent is required. Your data may be transferred outside Korea (e.g., to [United States and Japan]) with appropriate safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Philippines] Under the Data Privacy Act of 2012, you have rights to be informed, access, rectification, erasure/blocking, objection, and data portability. Minors (under 18) should use the service only with parental consent; we may request verification. Data may be processed outside the Philippines (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Hong Kong] Under the PDPO, you may exercise access and correction rights and opt out of direct marketing. We use clear, child-friendly notices where appropriate. Data may be processed outside Hong Kong (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Sri Lanka] Under the Personal Data Protection Act 2022, you may request access, correction, and erasure, and object in certain cases. International transfers (e.g., to [United States and Japan]) are made with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Pakistan] You may request access, correction, or deletion under applicable law. Your data may be processed outside Pakistan (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Nepal] You may request access, correction, or deletion under applicable law. Your data may be processed outside Nepal (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Maldives] You may request access, correction, or deletion under applicable law. Your data may be processed outside Maldives (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Cambodia] You may request information about, correction of, or deletion of your data. Your data may be processed outside Cambodia (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Lao PDR] You may request access or correction under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Lao PDR (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Brunei] Under the PDPO, you may request access/correction and, where minors are involved, we may request parental/guardian consent. Cross-border transfers (e.g., to [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Malaysia] Under the PDPA, you may request access/correction and object to certain processing. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Singapore] Under the PDPA, you may request access/correction and withdraw consent. For users under 13, a parent/guardian should contact us to consent. Overseas transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) follow PDPA safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Brazil] Under the LGPD, you have rights including confirmation/access, correction, deletion, objection, portability, and withdrawal of consent. International transfers (e.g., to [United States and Japan]) occur with safeguards and/or consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Argentina] Under Law 25.326, you may request access, rectification/update, and deletion/blocking; complaints may be filed with the AAIP. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) rely on permitted mechanisms/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Chile] Under Law 21.719, you may request access, rectification, deletion, and objection. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) are made with safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Colombia] Under Law 1581/2012 (Habeas Data), you have rights to access, correction, deletion, and revocation. If a local database meets thresholds, we will register with the RNBD. Transfers abroad (e.g., [United States and Japan]) rely on lawful bases/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Peru] Under Law 29733, you may request access, rectification, cancellation, and opposition. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Ecuador] Under the LOPDP, you may exercise access, rectification, deletion, opposition, and portability; the SPDP oversees compliance. Transfers abroad (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Uruguay] Under Law 18.331, you have rights to access, rectification, and deletion; URCDP oversees compliance. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use adequacy/safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Paraguay] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. A comprehensive data protection law is pending; this Supplement will be updated when in force. Data may be processed outside Paraguay (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Bolivia] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Bolivia (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Guyana] Under the Data Protection Act 2023, you have rights to access, correction, deletion, and objection. Transfers abroad (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Suriname] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Suriname (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[French Guiana] GDPR applies: you have rights to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability; you may also contact CNIL. Cross-border transfers (e.g., to [United States and Japan]) rely on lawful bases (e.g., SCCs/DPF). Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Jamaica] Under the Data Protection Act 2020, you may request access, correction, erasure, and object to certain processing. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Trinidad & Tobago] Under the Data Protection Act 2011, you may request access/correction and have your personal data protected. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Barbados] Under the Data Protection Act 2019, you may request access, rectification, erasure, and object. Transfers abroad (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Bahamas] Under the Data Protection Act 2003, you may request access/correction and object to certain processing. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Cayman Islands] Under the Data Protection Act 2017, you have rights to access, rectification, erasure, and objection; the Ombudsman oversees compliance. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Bermuda] Under PIPA, you have rights including access, correction, and withdrawal of consent. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[British Virgin Islands] Under the Data Protection Act 2021, you have rights to access, correction, and erasure. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Turks & Caicos] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside TCI (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Anguilla] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Anguilla (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Antigua & Barbuda] Under the Data Protection Act 2013, you may request access/correction/erasure and object. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Dominica] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Dominica (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Saint Lucia] Under the Data Protection Act 2011, you may request access/correction/erasure; controller registration may apply in certain cases. Transfers abroad use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Saint Vincent & the Grenadines] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside SVG (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Grenada] Under the Data Protection Act 2023, you have rights to access, correction, and erasure. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Haiti] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Haiti (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Curaçao] Under the Landsverordening bescherming persoonsgegevens, you have rights to access, correction, and erasure. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Aruba] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable personal data rules. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards/consent. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Namibia] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Namibia (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Liberia] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Liberia (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Seychelles] Under the Data Protection Act 2023, you may exercise access/correction/erasure and object. International transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Vanuatu] Under the Data Protection & Privacy Act, you have rights to access, correction, erasure, and objection. Cross-border transfers (e.g., [United States and Japan]) use safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Nauru] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Nauru (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Tonga] You may request access/correction/erasure under applicable law. Data may be processed outside Tonga (e.g., [United States and Japan]) with safeguards. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.

[Costa Rica] Under Law No. 8968 (Law on the Protection of the Person Regarding the Processing of Personal Data) and its Regulation, you may exercise ARCO rights-access, rectification/update, cancellation/deletion, and objection. Where required, we will register any database that distributes, discloses, or commercializes personal data with the national authority PRODHAB (in-house databases used only internally do not require registration). Cross-border transfers (e.g., to [United States and Japan]) are carried out with appropriate safeguards and, where required by law, based on your prior express consent. You may also lodge complaints with PRODHAB. Contact: info@knowhere.co.jp.'
+      },
     ]
   }
 };

+        content: 'The Company will not discriminate against a User that chooses to exercise any rights related to a User's privacy or Personal Information. The Company will not deny goods or services, charge different prices or rates, provide a different level of service or quality of goods, or suggest that a User might receive a different price or level of quality for goods as a result of User exercising any rights herein.

Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, Oregon, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and Virginia
These additional rights and disclosures may apply to residents of Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, Oregon, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and Virginia.
Data Subject Requests
If a User is a resident of these states, these state's law may provide some or all of the following rights:
To confirm whether or not the Company is processing User's personal data;
To access User's personal data;
To correct inaccuracies in User's personal data;
To delete User's personal data;
To obtain a copy of User's personal data that User previously provided to the Company in a portable and readily usable format; or
To obtain a list of third parties to which the Company disclosed User's personal data.
To exercise any of these rights, a User must submit a request as provided for in Article 12. Please note these rights are subject to exceptions. If a User has an account with the Company, the Company may require User to use the account to submit the request. In the request, please specify which right User is seeking to exercise and the scope of the request. The Company will confirm receipt of the request within 10 days and respond to the request within 45 days. To verify User identity, the Company may require a User to confirm receipt of an email sent to an email address that matches Company records, provide the Company with details relating to User's history with the Company, or provide additional information. If the Company is unable to verify a User's identity, the Company may deny User's request.
Sales and Targeted Advertising
The Company does not disclose or otherwise sell personal data (e.g., identifiers and service and platform usage) or Personal Information to any third party for the purposes of selling such personal data or Personal Information or for providing targeted or behavioral advertising.
Profiling
The Company does not process personal data or Personal Information for purposes of profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects concerning consumers.
Designated Methods and Authorized Agents
All rights requests must be exercised through the designated methods listed above. A User may make a rights request using an authorized agent. The Company requires written and signed proof of the agent's permission to do so and the Company may verify User identity directly with the User.
Appeal
A User may have the right to appeal the Company's denial of User's request. To appeal, please contact the Company at the email address provided in Article 12 and specify what the User would like to appeal. The Company will review and respond to the appeal in accordance with applicable law. If the Company denies the appeal, the User may submit a complaint as follows:
For Colorado residents, visit https://coag.gov/file-complaint/
For Connecticut residents, visit https://www.dir.ct.gov/ag/complaint/
For Delaware residents, visit https://attorneygeneral.delaware.gov/fraud/cmu/complaint/
For Iowa residents, visit https://www.iowaattorneygeneral.gov/for-consumers/file-a-consumer-complaint
For Montana residents, visit https://dojmt.gov/office-of-consumer-protection/consumer-complaints/
For Nebraska residents, visit https://www.nebraska.gov/apps-ago-complaints/
For New Hampshire residents, visit https://www.doj.nh.gov/citizens/consumer-protection-antitrust-bureau/consumer-complaints
For Oregon residents, visit https://www.doj.state.or.us/oregon-department-of-justice/contact-us/
For Tennessee residents, visit https://www.tn.gov/attorneygeneral/working-for-tennessee/consumer/file-a-complaint
For Texas residents, visit https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/consumer-protection/file-consumer-complaint
For Utah residents, visit https://attorneygeneral.utah.gov/contact/complaint-form/
For Virginia residents, visit https://www.oag.state.va.us/consumercomplaintform

content.text:
はい、Article 15 content には差分があります。

## 主な変更点

1. **フォーマット変更**
   - 改行文字 `\n\n` を `\n` に変更(各セクションの間隔を調整)

2. **地域別補足の分離**
   - Article 15 の末尾にあった以下の地域の記述を新しい Article「Regional supplements」として分離:
     - カナダ (PIPEDA)
     - ドミニカ共和国
     - パナマ
     - ニカラグア
     - ベネズエラ
     - 韓国
     - 台湾

3. **新規 Article の追加**
   - 「Regional supplements」という新しい Article を追加し、より多くの国・地域のデータ保護法に関する記述を追加(南半球諸国、カリブ海諸国、東南アジア諸国など多数)

つまり、Article 15 の内容自体は簡潔化され、地域別の補足情報が独立した Article として整理されました。

ファイル全体: `web/src/pages/privacy-policy.tsx:135-139`
